## Diff of `main.tex` (v0 â†’ v70)

**Deleted** (original content):
```latex
\documentclass{article}
\usepackage{graphicx} % Required for inserting images

\title{CLI Test Suite}
\author{Dylan Moore}

```

**Inserted** (current content):
```latex
\documentclass{article}
\usepackage{graphicx}

\title{Wildfire Modeling Draft}
\author{Dylan Moore}
\date{March 2026}

\begin{document}
\maketitle
\section{Introduction}
This document was edited by an AI agent as part of automated testing.

\section{Methods}
Methods will be described here.

\section{Results}
Results will be presented here.

\end{document}
```

Key changes: title renamed from "CLI Test Suite" to "Wildfire Modeling Draft", removed the graphicx comment, and added Introduction content plus new Methods and Results sections.
